title: Immunofluorescence (IF) Protocol: Detection of GPNMB and TFE3 in Cultured ASPS Cell Lines
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3hp5n","text":"Purpose Immunofluorescence staining for the simultaneous detection of GPNMB and TFE3 proteins in cultured Alveolar Soft Part Sarcoma (ASPS) cell lines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"92r9e","text":"Notes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fq8h2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4348m","text":"- Protect samples from light after addition of fluorescent secondary antibodies to preserve signal intensity.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amqm0","text":"- Include appropriate controls (single-color, isotype, and no-primary-antibody controls) in every experiment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"787la","text":"- Fixation and permeabilization times are not specified in the original protocol. Standard times are typically 10–20 min for fixation and 10–15 min for permeabilization at room temperature — these should be optimized for the specific cell line used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9hufi","text":"- This protocol is designed for manual staining of cultured cells grown on slides or coverslips.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"holpo","text":"- Opti-MEM™ medium supplemented with 10% FBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nispi","text":"- 4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA) in PBS (fixative)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"k3tci","text":"- 0.5% Triton X-100 in PBS (permeabilization solution)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mpv7n","text":"- Goat polyclonal anti-human GPNMB antibody (R\u0026D Systems, AF2550, 20 µg/mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ove2q","text":"- Rabbit monoclonal anti-TFE3 antibody (Sigma Cell Marque, 354R-15, 1:25)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kxv9b","text":"- Alexa Fluor® 647 Donkey anti-Goat IgG (Thermo, cat. no. A-21447, 1 µg/mL) – for GPNMB detection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7jebs","text":"- DyLight™ 488 Donkey anti-rabbit IgG (BioLegend, cat. no. 406404, 1 µg/mL) – for TFE3 detection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"chqzr","text":"- ProLong™ Gold antifade reagent with DAPI (Invitrogen, cat. no. P36935)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture ASPS cell lines in Opti-MEM™ supplemented with 10% FBS for 48 hours on appropriate chamber slides or coverslips.
Permeabilize the fixed cells using 0.5% Triton X-100.
Incubate cells overnight at 4°C with both primary antibodies simultaneously:
Goat polyclonal anti-human GPNMB (R&D Systems, AF2550) at 20 µg/mL
Rabbit monoclonal anti-TFE3 (Sigma Cell Marque, 354R-15) at 1:25 dilution
Incubate with secondary antibodies at 1 µg/mL for 30 minutes at room temperature:
Alexa Fluor® 647 Donkey anti-Goat IgG for GPNMB detection
DyLight™ 488 Donkey anti-rabbit IgG for TFE3 detection
Mount the samples with one drop of ProLong™ Gold antifade reagent containing DAPI.
Digitalize the stained slides using the ECHO Revolve fluorescent microscope (ECHO, RVL-100-M) at 40× resolution.
creator: Franz Zemp
